plan.description: Find all .ts files in src/. Read each one to map out the codebase structure: which files import what, where ReviewOutput and ReviewFinding types are used.

Rename the type ReviewFinding to ReviewIssue everywhere — in types.ts (definition), review.ts (schema and validation), render.ts, agent.ts, and any other files that reference it. Also rename the REVIEW_FINDING_SCHEMA to REVIEW_ISSUE_SCHEMA.

Rename the findings field to issues everywhere — in ReviewOutput interface (types.ts), SUBMIT_REVIEW_SCHEMA (review.ts), validateReviewOutput (review.ts), render functions, agent.ts, and all other references.
Verify all changes: grep for any remaining 'ReviewFinding' or old 'findings' field references. Read key files to confirm they compile logically.

initialState.task: Rename ReviewFinding -> ReviewIssue and findings -> issues across the entire hodor codebase (~15 files, 2300 lines).

assertions.description: review.ts should not have old schema name
